standards.teleology: Keep public standards and paper modules parseable, bounded, and receipt-backed.
standards.anti_claim: Runtime grammar validates metadata shape and does not claim doctrine completeness.

standards.teleology: Keep public paper modules tied to governing standards, receipt expectations, and anti-claims.
standards.anti_claim: Paper-module validation does not publish macro doctrine bodies.

anti_claim: The exported standards registry is public metadata, not macro doctrine body text.
